faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: 🆓 Can I use Killer Control for free?
faq.a1:
Yes. The free plan is designed so you can verify the tool's real value without risking anything. With it, you can connect and manage up to 3 active subscriptions, receive basic alerts when a fee changes price, and view a monthly summary of your spending on digital services.

It is not an artificially limited trial plan: it is a functional tier designed for users with few subscriptions who want control without complications. If you ever need more capacity, scale to Premium with a single click and without losing any of your previous data or configurations.
faq.q2: 💎 What does the Premium plan include?
faq.a2:
Premium unlocks the full potential of Killer Control. These are the key differences compared to the free plan:

• Unlimited subscriptions — Connect all your services without a ceiling: streaming, software, gyms, paid newsletters, domains, cloud storage and any recurring fee.

• Real-time smart alerts — We notify you exactly when a platform raises its prices, launches a cheaper plan or changes its conditions.

• Complete price history — Visualize the evolution of each fee month by month and detect patterns of hidden increases.

• Personalized savings recommendations — Our AI engine analyzes your real usage profile and suggests cheaper alternatives or combos that reduce your total spend.

• Data export — Download your subscription report in CSV or PDF for accounting, freelance taxes or simply to have everything documented.
faq.q3: ❌ Can I cancel at any time?
faq.a3:
Absolutely, and no fine print. Killer Control has no lock-in periods, cancellation penalties or minimum commitment periods on any of its plans.

If you cancel Premium, your account is not deactivated abruptly: you will continue to enjoy all Premium features until the last day of the period you have already paid for. At the end of that cycle, your account will automatically switch back to the free plan keeping all your data, history and configurations intact.

You can reactivate Premium at any time if you change your mind, and everything will be exactly where you left it. Cancellation is managed in less than 30 seconds from your account dashboard, no forms or calls to customer service.
faq.q4: 💳 Do I need a card to get started?
faq.a4:
No. To sign up and use the free plan we do not ask for any payment details. No credit card, no bank account, no PayPal. Just your email.

We believe you should be able to verify if Killer Control is useful to you before committing any financial data. That's why signing up is completely free and frictionless.

We will only ask for a payment method when you decide to upgrade to Premium voluntarily. At that point we accept credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) and PayPal, with a secure encrypted transaction via Stripe.
faq.a5:
Behind every recommendation is an analysis system structured in three layers:

1. Tracking over 500 platforms — The system periodically collects and updates the prices and plans available across major digital services in the Spanish and international market: streaming, SaaS tools, storage, security, online education and more.

2. Personalized comparison with your profile — Your current fees are cross-referenced with available alternatives considering your usage frequency, potential overlaps between services (e.g., two platforms offering the same thing) and discounts for combos or annual plans you might not be utilizing.

3. Prioritization engine — Internal algorithms sort the opportunities based on their real economic impact (€/year saved), ease of switching, and risk of losing important features. This ensures recommendations are clear, practical, and results-oriented.

The result appears in your dashboard as a prioritized list of concrete actions, showing the estimated annual savings for each.
